title: Subagging (Subsample Aggregating) Process
description: A flowchart illustrating the Subagging procedure for creating a more stable and robust ensemble model by training on multiple random subsets of the data without replacement.
relationships: Original Dataset is partitioned into multiple Random Subsamples
Each Random Subsample is used to train a separate Base Model
Each trained Base Model makes predictions
All predictions are combined through Aggregation to produce the final, more robust prediction
